raw_transcript: I’m very proud of you for that. Alcohol is the leading cause of flares, so staying sober is the best thing you can do for your health. I'll see you back in four weeks to check your weight.
final_corrected_note: I’m very proud of you for that. Alcohol is the leading cause of flares, so staying sober is the best thing you can do for your health. I'll see you back in four weeks to check your weight.
